qa_pairs.question: What are the main specifications for the 1145 nodes on the Narval cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Each of the 1145 nodes on the Narval cluster has 64 cores, 250 GB or 256000 MB of available memory, two AMD EPYC 7532 (Zen 2) CPUs @ 2.40 GHz with a 256 MB L3 cache, and a 1 x 960 GB SSD for storage. These nodes do not have GPUs.

qa_pairs.question: What CPU model and architecture are used in the 1145 compute nodes of the Narval cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The 1145 compute nodes on the Narval cluster utilize two AMD EPYC 7532 processors, which are based on the Zen 2 architecture, running at 2.40 GHz and featuring a 256 MB L3 cache.
